description_long: This is a vintage-style yellow moped motorcycle with a step-through frame and a black cushioned seat. The frame is slender and features a prominent fuel tank area, with the engine and transmission components exposed below. The wheels are spoked and relatively thin, with black tires and visible pedals, indicating a pedal-assist mechanism typical of mopeds. The handlebars are upright and slightly curved, with a headlight mounted at the front and a rear luggage rack behind the seat. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible wear and a utilitarian black and yellow color scheme, making it suitable for urban commuting or short-distance travel.
description: A vintage yellow moped with a step-through frame, black seat, spoked wheels, and upright handlebars, featuring a headlight and rear luggage rack.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headlight, upright handlebars, and narrow front tire.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the step-through frame, engine, pedals, and full length of the seat.
description_view_2: Direct front view with the headlight and handlebars most prominent, showing the narrow profile.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the engine, pedals, rear luggage rack, and the full seat.
